theme.name: Sweet Candy Bubble Pop
theme.description: A glossy, playful, and modern aesthetic inspired by K-pop visuals, gummy candies, and soap bubbles. High gloss, soft shadows, and extreme roundness.

typography.instructions: Import fonts from Google Fonts: Nunito (400, 700, 900), Quicksand (500, 700), Fredoka (One). Use Fredoka for the Logo and giant playful headings. Use Nunito for UI elements.

buttons.primary: relative overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-b from-[#FF85C0] to-[#FF69B4] text-white font-black text-xl px-10 py-4 shadow-[0_4px_0_#C71585,0_10px_20px_rgba(255,20,147,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_0_#C71585,0_15px_25px_rgba(255,20,147,0.5)] active:shadow-[0_2px_0_#C71585] border-t-2 border-white/40
buttons.secondary: bg-white/50 hover:bg-white/80 text-[#FF1493] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-3 border-2 border-[#FF69B4]/30 backdrop-blur-md transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.icon: p-4 rounded-full bg-white/40 hover:bg-white/80 text-[#FF69B4] transition-all hover:scale-110 shadow-lg border border-white/50

cards.container: relative bg-white/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/60 rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(255,182,193,0.2)] overflow-hidden
cards.frame_item: cursor-pointer group relative aspect-[3/4] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border-4 border-transparent hover:border-white transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 shadow-md hover:shadow-xl bg-white/20

inputs.default: bg-white/70 border-2 border-white/50 focus:border-[#FF69B4] rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 text-[#FF1493] placeholder-[#FFB6C1] focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#FF69B4]/20 outline-none transition-all font-medium text-lg

layout_rules.spacing: Use 'p-6' or 'p-8' as standard padding. 'gap-6' for grids.
layout_rules.containers: Max-width containers should be 'max-w-md' (mobile focus) to 'max-w-4xl' (desktop view). Center everything vertically and horizontally for the photobooth feel.
layout_rules.grid: Use simple grids. 'grid-cols-2' for frames on mobile, 'grid-cols-4' on desktop.

landing.layout: Centered logo, floating bubbles background, massive 'Start' CTA.

frame_selection.layout: Grid of available frames. Selected state must be obvious (thick white border + checkmark).
frame_selection.details: Frames should be transparent PNGs overlaying a placeholder face.

capture.layout: Webcam feed central. Countdown overlay (big numbers). Controls at bottom.
capture.ui: Rounded camera viewfinder. Flash effect on capture.

preview.layout: Polaroid style result. Actions (Email, Download, Retake) below.
preview.details: The photo should have the selected frame applied.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use sharp corners. Everything must be rounded-xl, 2xl, or 3xl.
NEVER use pure black text. Use deep maroon or dark charcoal.
ALWAYS add a 'glass' reflection overlay on buttons (a subtle white gradient at the top).
Interactive elements must have a 'scale' effect on active/click (feeling tactile).
Ensure the webcam feed has `scale-x-[-1]` (mirror mode) for natural feel.
implementation_steps: Step 1: Install fonts (Nunito, Fredoka) via Google Fonts import in index.css.
Step 2: Update tailwind.config.js with 'sweet' color palette and custom keyframes (float, pop).
Step 3: Create a `Layout` component that includes the animated bubble background.
Step 4: Build the `GlassCard` and `JellyButton` reusable components.
Step 6: Implement Frame Selection (mock 4 candy frames).
